data.name: My Hot Goth Roommate Became My Goonmate 2
data.detailed_description:
After you and Kurobi enter a BDSM relationship, she quickly overwhelms you with her giant goth body, and makes you pass out from the pleasure. When you wake up in the middle of the night, you see Kurobi cuddling with you, and she's nowhere near satisfied. Kurobi, your giant, sadistic, goth goddess continues to torment you by unleashing her sadistic and sexual urges on you, and for a masochist like you, it's heaven.

My Hot Goth Roommate Became My Goonmate 2 continues the story of the mega-sadist and the mega-masochist and their equally pleasurable BDSM activities.

  • ~2.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 18 Unique character images

  • 21 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
